steps.title: Connect population to district
steps.content: The passage says House districts average about 760,000 people, but Alaska has only about 730,000 people. The next sentence gives the consequence: Alaska has a single district covering the whole state.

steps.title: Choose cause and effect
steps.content: Choice B signals substitution or contrast. Choice C signals the last item in a sequence. Choice D signals an example. The remaining choice signals that Alaska's one district results from its population size. The answer is A.
